title: Xtra Hearty Irish Lamb Stew
description: A rich and savory stew featuring lamb, pitted dates, and a soffritto base, perfect for curing hangovers. This Mediterranean-friendly dish is made with red wine and hearty ingredients.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the onions, carrots, and celery and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 8 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the red wine, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pot.
Add the pitted dates, tomato paste, and lamb broth, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours.
Stir in the chopped thyme and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
